interface.app_lab: Used for building mobile apps with JavaScript or blocks.
interface.game_lab: Used for building interactive animations and games using the Game Score library.

technical_constraints.ids: Every element in App Lab must have a unique ID to be controlled by 'onEvent' blocks.
technical_constraints.draw_loop: In Game Lab, all movement and drawing happens inside the function 'draw()'.

tips: Use 'setScreen' to navigate between different pages of your app.
The 'console.log' block is your best friend for debugging why a variable isn't changing.
